Wi, ~ 'Bfqcf [~ III/NI131/2001/-mli.] -- 1 of 2 -- ! ,, ',' 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY NATIONAL COUNCIL FOR TEACHER EDUCATION NOTIFICATION [PARTW-SEC.4) New Delhi, the 6th November, 2001 No. F. 9-31200 lIN CTE.- In exercise of the powers conferred under clauses (f) and (h) of Sub-section (2) of the Section 32 read with Sections 14 and 15 oftbe NCTE Act, I 993 (No. 73, 1993) aild further read with Rule 7 (4) ofNCTE EuIeS, 1997, the National Council for Teacher Education hereby makes the following amendments in the National Council for Teacher Education (Norms and Standardii for Recognition of Teacher Education Programmes) Regulations, 2001 notified in the Gazette ofIndia on 4th September, 2001. . Short Title and Commencement These Regulations may be called the National Council for Teacher Education (Norms and Standards for Teacher Education Programmes) (Amendment) Regulations, 2001. In the NCTE Notification of even number published in the Gazette oflndia Extraordinary Part III Section 4 vide No ... 239 dated 4-9-2001 notifying the National Council for Teacher Education (Norms and Standards for Recognition of Teacher Education Programmes) Regulations, 2001, para 1(b) of the Norms cindStandards for Master of Education Progranmle , (N1.Ed.) (Pait Time) at Appendix IV to the National Council for Teacber Education (Norms and Standards for recognition of \, teacher education programmes) Regulations, 2001 is substituted by the following:- l(b) "Only University Departments of Education, Institutes of Advanced Studies in Education (lASEs) and Colleges of Teacher Education (CTEs) which run M.Ed. programme, arc eligible to offer M. Ed (part Time) prograinrile subject to such a course instituted by the concerned affiliating university." These amendments shall come into force with immediate effect. S. K. RAY, Member Secy.
